title: Shiga
forgotPasswordInstructions: Shigar da adresin imel da kuke amfani da shi don shiga asusunku
forgotPasswordSendEmail: Za mu aika muku imel tare da umarnin zaɓar sabon kalmar sirri.
twoFactorTitle: Shigar da Lambar Izinin Abubuwa Biyu!
twoFactorInstructions: Yi amfani da authenticator ɗin da aka saita don samun lambar kuma shigar da ita anan.
emailVerificationInstructions: Shigar da lambar tsaro da aka aika zuwa imelku.
welcomeBack: Barka da dawowa al'ummarmu mai girma
pleaseEnterUsername: Don Allah shigar da sunan mai amfani
pleaseEnterPassword: Don Allah shigar da kalmar sirri
pleaseEnterEmail: Don Allah shigar da adresin imel
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Don Allah shigar da adresin imel mai inganci
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Don Allah shigar da lambar katunan kyauta
invalidCode: Lambar ba daidai ba, don Allah shigar da lambar daidai.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: An kunna tabbacin abubuwa biyu don wannan asusu. Shigar da lambar authenticator ɗinka don kammala shiga.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: Ba a sami asusu da aka haɗa ba don {name}. Shigar da bayanan shiga na yanzu don haɗawa, ko ƙirƙiri sabon asusu.
oauth.linkExistingAccount: Haɗa Asusun da ake da shi
oauth.verifyEmailSent: An aika lambar tabbatarwa zuwa imelku.
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Don Allah shigar da imel da kalmar sirri

sudo.redirecting: An shiga a matsayin abokin ciniki, ana koma zuwa gida.
